abort.single_instance_allowed: You can only add a single YidCal instance.

error.select_db_required: If you enable a Yahrtzeit sensor, you must select at least one database.

data.is_in_israel: If you live in Israel, check this
data.strip_nikud: Strip vowel points (nikud) from Hebrew text
data.candlelighting_offset: Minutes before sunset for candle lighting
data.tallis_tefilin_offset: Minutes after dawn for tallis & tefilin
data.korbanos_yud_gimmel_midos: Is Korbanos read at Mincha on Shlosh Esrei Middos?
data.mishne_torah_hoshana_rabba: Is Mishneh Torah read on the night of Hoshana Rabba?
data.day_label_language: Day label language for the Full Display sensor
data.include_date: Include Hebrew date on the Full Display sensor
data.include_attribute_sensors: Create separate sensors for holiday attributes
data.include_sefirah_short_in_full: Include short Sefiras HaOmer count on the Full Display sensor
data.enable_multiday_candles: Create separate candle lighting sensors for Night 2/Night 3
data.slichos_label_rollover: When should the Selichos label roll over
data.upcoming_lookahead_days: Days to look ahead in the Upcoming Holiday sensor
data.enable_zmanim_lookup: Create the Zmanim Lookup sensor and yidcal.check_zmanim service

data_description.enable_multiday_candles: When enabled, the Zman Erev sensor becomes static (Night 1 only) and only advances at 12:00 AM on Motzi night
data_description.enable_zmanim_lookup: Adds sensor.yidcal_zmanim_lookup plus the yidcal.check_zmanim service. Call the service with any date (±100 years) and the sensor will populate with that day's zmanim and a Hebrew day label.
